title: Quiet white dog on the chair
goal: Introduce the white dog in a clean, minimal pose before the transformation begins.

title: Reveal of the black dog
goal: Show the transformed black dog in the same simple setup, preserving continuity while making the change unmistakable.

title: White dog before the switch
goal: Anchor the opening state of the second shot with the white dog held in a minimal, readable composition.

title: Black dog after the switch
goal: Anchor the ending state of the second shot with the black dog clearly established in the same minimal world.
